---
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| output: asis
source("R/schedule.R")

cat("| | |\n|---|---|\n")
cat(sprintf("| Instructor | %s |\n", class_config$course_instructor))
cat(sprintf("| Email | <%s> |\n", class_config$course_instructor_email))
cat(sprintf("| Meeting time | %s |\n", class_config$course_meeting_time))
cat(sprintf("| Office hours | %s |\n", class_config$course_office_hours))
cat(sprintf("| Start date | %s |\n", format(class_start_date, "%b %d, %Y")))
cat(sprintf("| End date | %s |\n\n", format(class_end_date, "%b %d, %Y")))
```


## Schedule

```{r}
#| echo: false
knitr::kable(class_schedule_df)
```
